title: Senior Backend Engineer
narrative: We are hiring a senior backend engineer (5+ years professional experience or equivalent). Essential functions: design + implement REST APIs, mentor junior engineers, on-call rotation (1 week per quarter). Requirements: strong knowledge of distributed systems, fluency in at least one of Go / Python / Rust, experience with SQL + NoSQL stores. We offer salary range $180k-$250k (NYC). EEO statement: Acme Corp is an Equal Opportunity Employer; we do not discriminate on the basis of any protected class. ADA accommodation: contact accommodations@acme.example. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.
